_comment: Template ONLY — synthetic placeholders. Copy to ~/.config/jl/fullwechat-backends.json on the AMR host and fill in REAL host/wxid/token paths there (that real copy is NEVER committed; this repo is public). `jl account onboard` reads the real copy by default; each enabled entry is identity-preflighted (GET /api/status/auth: base wxid must equal self_id) before any binding — the second gate against the wrong-account-binding bug.
